# Antares Yuan — AI PM

> AI Product Manager. A living roadmap of what I've shipped, what I'm building, and where I'm going.

I build AI products by treating myself like one — versioned, measured, always shipping.

## Identity

- Role: AI Product Manager
- Location: Seattle|Beijing · open to remote
